channel.title: Composeflux on Veerendra's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Composeflux on Veerendra's Blog

item.title: GitOps for Homeservers (Part 3) — ComposeFlux: A Lightweight GitOps Tool for Docker Compose
item.description:
This is Part 3 of a 3-part series: “GitOps for Homeservers”

  • Part 1: My Homeservers, Ansible, and the Pain Points
  • Part 2: Searching for the Right Tool — Komodo, Dockhand, and Beyond
  • Part 3: ComposeFlux — A Lightweight GitOps Tool for Docker Compose (You are here)

Introduction

In Part 1, I covered my homeserver setup and the Ansible-based deployment workflow along with its pain points. In Part 2, I evaluated alternatives like Komodo and Dockhand — solid tools, but none fully fit my needs.
